name: @peerbit/shared-log-rust
description: Rust-backed shared-log range planner for Peerbit

scripts.benchmark:get-samples: npm run build && pnpm --filter @peerbit/shared-log run build && node ./dist/benchmark/get-samples.js
scripts.clean: aegir clean && shx rm -rf ./wasm && cargo clean
scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir wasm --out-name shared_log_rust && shx rm -rf ./wasm/.gitignore ./wasm/package.json && aegir build --no-bundle && shx rm -rf ./dist/wasm && shx cp -r ./wasm ./dist/wasm
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run e2e:build && playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test: cargo test && npm run build && pnpm --filter @peerbit/shared-log run build && aegir test

author: Peerbit contributors
